summary: Good audience recording captures a primal 1968 set with standout Dark Star and the rare Good Morning Little Schoolgirl.
review: The three reviewers agree this is a solid audience (AUD) tape – not pristine, but the best‑sounding version of the night currently on Archive. The performance shines with a classic pig riff in Dark Star and a notable 16‑minute rendition of Good Morning Little Schoolgirl, giving listeners a satisfying glimpse of the Dead’s psychedelic ’68 vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews highlight both good show moments and a recording that, while not perfect, is considered the best available for this night.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough for an audience tape; praised as the best‑sounding version of this 1968 show despite inherent limitations of AUD sources.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Missing first set on the reels, but the available material shows a primal, psychedelic flow with strong moments that outweigh any gaps.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Classic pig riff highlighted in Dark Star.
